description: Colombian-Venezuelan criminal organization based in Maicao, Colombia, operating in the La Guajira peninsula and the Venezuelan state of Zulia. Specializes in smuggling, drug trafficking, arms trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and murder. Founded in Maicao, Colombia, and maintains alliances with the Cartel de los Soles.

country_links.evidence_quote: donde es exportada a otras islas del Caribe como República Dominicana y Haití
country_links.context: The cartel exports drugs to the Dominican Republic as part of its trafficking route.

country_links.evidence_quote: donde es exportada a otras islas del Caribe como República Dominicana y Haití
country_links.context: The cartel exports drugs to Haiti as part of its trafficking route, and a member was killed there.

country_links.evidence_quote: secuestro, el 17 de mayo de 2013, de los ciudadanos españoles María Concepción Marlaska y Ángel Sánchez Fernández
country_links.context: The cartel kidnapped Spanish citizens in Colombia.

country_links.evidence_quote: con destino a Estados Unidos y Europa
country_links.context: The cartel's drugs are destined for the United States, and it negotiated a cocaine shipment to the US.

country_links.evidence_quote: Su territorio base es la ciudad de Maracaibo y gran parte del Estado Zulia en Venezuela
country_links.context: The cartel has its base territory in Maracaibo and much of Zulia state in Venezuela, and it processes and transports drugs through Venezuela.
